RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0008 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Liam Mensah SSN: [REDACTED] Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 99,080 2 Federal income tax withheld 8,025 3 Social security wages 37,755 4 Social security tax withheld 7,004 5 Medicare wages and tips 67,841 6 Medicare tax withheld 1,575
